scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @csm/contracts build && pnpm --filter @csm/observability build && pnpm --filter @csm/domain build && pnpm --filter @csm/database build && pnpm --filter @csm/bank-client build && pnpm --filter @csm/brokerage-client build && pnpm --filter @csm/temporal-workflows build && pnpm --filter @csm/temporal-activities build && pnpm --filter @csm/test-support build && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @csm/contracts build && pnpm --filter @csm/observability build && pnpm --filter @csm/domain build && pnpm --filter @csm/database build && vitest run
scripts.test:failure: pnpm --filter @csm/contracts build && pnpm --filter @csm/observability build && pnpm --filter @csm/domain build && pnpm --filter @csm/database build && pnpm --filter @csm/test-support build && pnpm --filter @csm/domain test && pnpm --filter @csm/observability test && pnpm --filter @csm/bank-simulator test && pnpm --filter @csm/brokerage-simulator test && pnpm --filter @csm/database test && pnpm --filter @csm/api test && pnpm --filter @csm/e2e test && pnpm --filter @csm/temporal-activities test && pnpm --filter @csm/temporal-workflows test
